name: Twitter Ads (X Ads)
description: The X (Twitter) Ads API lets you programmatically create, manage, and measure advertising campaigns on the X platform. Use it to manage campaigns, line items (ad groups), creatives, promoted posts, audience targeting, and pull analytics reports on campaign performance.

capabilities.name: manage_campaigns
capabilities.description: Create, update, pause, or delete ad campaigns. Configure campaign objective, budget, start/end dates, and funding instrument.

capabilities.name: manage_line_items
capabilities.description: Create, update, or delete line items (ad groups) within a campaign. Set bid amount, optimization goal, placement, and audience targeting.

capabilities.name: manage_creatives
capabilities.description: Create and manage promoted tweets, cards, and media creatives. Associate creatives with line items to serve them in campaigns.

capabilities.name: manage_targeting
capabilities.description: Set targeting criteria on line items including location, gender, age, interests, keywords, followers look-alikes, and custom audiences.

capabilities.name: get_campaign_analytics
capabilities.description: Retrieve performance analytics for campaigns, line items, or promoted tweets. Metrics include impressions, engagements, clicks, spend, and conversions.

capabilities.name: manage_audiences
capabilities.description: Create and manage custom (tailored) audiences by uploading email lists, device IDs, or Twitter user IDs. Use audiences for targeting or exclusion.
